title: Onchain Resume
description: Generate a shareable public profile page for any wallet — wallet age, chain activity, top assets, NFTs, and DeFi history all in one URL.
useCase: Build a wallet.eth/0x... profile page that serves as an onchain resume — showing when the wallet was created, which chains it's active on, top token holdings, and NFT collection.

keyParams.walletAddress: 0x wallet address or ENS name to build the onchain resume for
keyParams.chainName: Primary chain for balances, NFTs, and ENS resolution
